summary: Deep analysis of alternative encoding strategies for F-persistence. Found that pre-saturation of all witnesses simultaneously fails (multi-witness seed inconsistency counterexample), bounded chain jumps are impossible (Lindenbaum non-determinism), and saturation-first collapses to constant families (dead end). Recommended: fragment-level completeness with order-theoretic SuccOrder for Int embedding.

artifacts.summary: 12-part research report analyzing 5 strategies for resolving F-persistence obstacle, with counterexamples, Mathlib lookups, and concrete recommendations

next_steps: Run /plan 951 to create implementation plan v7 based on fragment-level completeness approach
